summary: Iteration 6 testing of Cloudy Pitch — card picker modal, premium page, AdSlot placements, InterstitialAd. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (auth /me exposes is_premium+premium_until, /cards/me joined card object, /predictions accepts card_ids[] with cap=2, paystack initialize returns 503 unconfigured, regression routes pass). Frontend: card picker modal opens with boost-preview, empty state works, save button updates pill state; Premium page renders with hero+price+disabled Subscribe button+Paystack warning+8 compare rows; InterstitialAd triggers on /predictions navigation, has correct testid, dismiss works and increments localStorage counter; wc_hub_sponsor AdSlot visible on /worldcup Groups tab.

integration_issues.issue: InterstitialAd overlay can intercept clicks on /predictions if it triggers during navigation — this is the documented design (rate-limited 1/3min), but testing requires dismissing interstitial first. Not a bug, just a UX consideration.

observations: Admin user has 0 cards with uses_remaining > 0 — modal correctly shows cards-empty state with 'Browse Legend Cards' CTA. Spec said admin starts with 5 starter Star cards on signup; possibly consumed in prior iterations OR the starter_pack grant has issue. Not blocking iteration 6 since empty path is also a tested code path.

match_list_inline AdSlot is conditional: only renders in /football live/upcoming/finished modes when there are >=2 league groups (renders after every 3rd group except the last). On 'date' mode (default) no match_list_inline ad is shown — this matches Dashboard.jsx implementation.
wc_hub_sponsor AdSlot confirmed visible on /worldcup Groups tab.
Boost preview shows Base × Stage / Card Boost / If exact columns correctly (30 / +0% / 30 for default no-selection state).
action_items: Optional: verify admin starter_pack on signup grants 5 Star cards with uses_remaining > 0 (admin currently shows 0 owned with uses).
critical_code_review_comments: InterstitialAd correctly excludes BLOCKED_PATHS (/payment, /signin, /signup, /premium) but DOES trigger on /predictions; ensure UX is acceptable since it can block user interaction immediately after navigation.
Predictions.jsx — auto-poll/load() is one-shot (no setInterval), so pickerFor state remains stable. Good.
Predictions submit() passes card_ids: cardSel[matchId] || [] correctly — backend caps at 2 (verified).
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_iter6_* signup users with random emails for predictions/card_ids tests. Purchased a few cards onto these test users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 backend coverage in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6.py (16 tests, all passing). InterstitialAd appears on /predictions navigation when cp_interstitial_last_ts is empty/stale — clear localStorage between predictions tests to either trigger or skip interstitial. Admin user appears to have 0 cards with uses_remaining; main agent may want to investigate or seed cards. The /football match_list_inline ad slots only render in live/upcoming/finished modes (not date mode) and only when >=2 league groups exist.
rca_of_issues: No production bugs found in iteration 6 scope. Initial test failure on card picker modal was due to InterstitialAd overlay intercepting click — resolved by dismissing interstitial first. No code fixes needed.
